where.if: AND (m.member_nm ILIKE '%' || #{kw} || '%' OR m.login_id ILIKE '%' || #{kw} || '%' OR m.member_phone ILIKE '%' || #{kw} || '%')

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND m.join_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND m.join_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbMember :: selectById */ m.* , s.site_nm , cd_gr.code_label AS grade_cd_nm , cd_ms.code_label AS member_status_cd_nm FROM mb_member m LEFT JOIN sy_site s ON s.site_id = m.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_gr ON cd_gr.code_grp = 'MEMBER_GRADE' AND cd_gr.code_value = m.grade_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ms ON cd_ms.code_grp = 'MEMBER_STATUS' AND cd_ms.code_value = m.member_status_cd WHERE m.member_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbMember :: selectList */ m.* , s.site_nm , cd_gr.code_label AS grade_cd_nm , cd_ms.code_label AS member_status_cd_nm FROM mb_member m LEFT JOIN sy_site s ON s.site_id = m.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_gr ON cd_gr.code_grp = 'MEMBER_GRADE' AND cd_gr.code_value = m.grade_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ms ON cd_ms.code_grp = 'MEMBER_STATUS' AND cd_ms.code_value = m.member_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbMember :: selectPageList */ m.* , s.site_nm , cd_gr.code_label AS grade_cd_nm , cd_ms.code_label AS member_status_cd_nm FROM mb_member m LEFT JOIN sy_site s ON s.site_id = m.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_gr ON cd_gr.code_grp = 'MEMBER_GRADE' AND cd_gr.code_value = m.grade_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ms ON cd_ms.code_grp = 'MEMBER_STATUS' AND cd_ms.code_value = m.member_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(m.*) FROM mb_member m /* base.ec.mb :: MbMember :: selectPageCount */
